use_cases: Displaying status indicators for items in a table or list
Showing category labels or tags on content cards
Indicating notification counts or metadata badges
Marking items as new, featured, or special in product listings
Showing progress states or severity levels in dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status indicators, tags, and labels. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling and includes focus ring accessibility features. Part of the Ruixen.Ui table dialog component set.
